channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Grah…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Graham “I like you most” to fill her late brother’s Senate seat. But even within South Carolina, little is known about her public policy views.
item.content:encoded: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Graham “I like you most” to fill her late brother’s Senate seat. But even within South Carolina, little is known about her public policy views.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 猫になっ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 山根顕人 とある老夫婦。ある日、おじいさんが起きると、おばあさんが猫になっていた。家事ができないおじいさんは、一人奮闘するが…？
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 山根顕人 とある老夫婦。ある日、おじいさんが起きると、おばあさんが猫になっていた。家事ができないおじいさんは、一人奮闘するが…？

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com In talking with recent college …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

In talking with recent college graduates, Emi Nietfeld has found that “like job seekers of all ages, they feel terrified and discouraged,” she writes. “But one thing stood out: Many students told me that ambition as I knew it no longer makes sense.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

In talking with recent college graduates, Emi Nietfeld has found that “like job seekers of all ages, they feel terrified and discouraged,” she writes. “But one thing stood out: Many students told me that ambition as I knew it no longer makes sense.”

item.title: Four Republicans joined Democrats to back a House resolution…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Four Republicans joined Democrats to back a House resolution seeking to limit Trump's military action in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Four Republicans joined Democrats to back a House resolution seeking to limit Trump's military action in Iran.

item.title: #🔖暮らし 猫が旅立った 愛猫が旅立った 会社の近所のツツジの植え込みにいた子だった 雨に濡れた姿を見かねて、わざわ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
猫が旅立った

愛猫が旅立った 会社の近所のツツジの植え込みにいた子だった 雨に濡れた姿を見かねて、わざわざペット可の物件に引っ越してお迎えした にゃあにゃあとよく喋る子だった 前足がちょいちょいとよく出てくる子だった お刺身を取り合いしながら食べたこともあったっけ でもそれ以外の人間の食べ物には興味がない賢い子だっ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
猫が旅立った

愛猫が旅立った 会社の近所のツツジの植え込みにいた子だった 雨に濡れた姿を見かねて、わざわざペット可の物件に引っ越してお迎えした にゃあにゃあとよく喋る子だった 前足がちょいちょいとよく出てくる子だった お刺身を取り合いしながら食べたこともあったっけ でもそれ以外の人間の食べ物には興味がない賢い子だっ...

item.title: The US has experienced a spate of flash flood emergencies du…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The US has experienced a spate of flash flood emergencies during the past two weeks, illustrating July’s dangerous side. The month has featured multiple 1,000-year rainfall events across the US, and July is not over yet. https://cnn.it/45iDuJL
item.content:encoded: The US has experienced a spate of flash flood emergencies during the past two weeks, illustrating July’s dangerous side. The month has featured multiple 1,000-year rainfall events across the US, and July is not over yet. https://cnn.it/45iDuJL

item.content:encoded: Legal logging and soaring saplings: the ‘green islands’ bucking the deforestation trend in central America

item.title: The Republican-led US House of Representatives backed legisl…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: The Republican-led US House of Representatives backed legislation directing President Trump to halt military action against Iran, the latest symbolic ‌rebuke of the Republican president from Congress reut.rs/3RmFJIN
item.content:encoded: The Republican-led US House of Representatives backed legislation directing President Trump to halt military action against Iran, the latest symbolic ‌rebuke of the Republican president from Congress reut.rs/3RmFJIN

item.title: When US President Donald Trump revived a long-stalled pipeli…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: When US President Donald Trump revived a long-stalled pipeline project to bring more natural gas to the Northeast, he vowed to use the force of the federal government to make it happen. More than a year later, construction has yet to begin.
item.content:encoded: When US President Donald Trump revived a long-stalled pipeline project to bring more natural gas to the Northeast, he vowed to use the force of the federal government to make it happen. More than a year later, construction has yet to begin.

item.title: After the contest has been upended several times in just the…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: After the contest has been upended several times in just the last few days, a front-runner has yet to emerge for the entire party to rally around.
item.content:encoded: After the contest has been upended several times in just the last few days, a front-runner has yet to emerge for the entire party to rally around.

item.title: President Trump has described noncitizen voting as a Democra…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: President Trump has described noncitizen voting as a Democratic plot to influence elections. But behind his claims of widespread fraud lies a different reality: many of the people prosecuted said they believed they were voting legally reut.rs/4vQ0tH4
item.content:encoded: President Trump has described noncitizen voting as a Democratic plot to influence elections. But behind his claims of widespread fraud lies a different reality: many of the people prosecuted said they believed they were voting legally reut.rs/4vQ0tH4

item.title: As the war in the Middle East limits the supply of energy wo…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: As the war in the Middle East limits the supply of energy worldwide, millions of farmers are contending with scarcity and higher prices for fuel, threatening their food supply and access to irrigation.
item.content:encoded: As the war in the Middle East limits the supply of energy worldwide, millions of farmers are contending with scarcity and higher prices for fuel, threatening their food supply and access to irrigation.

item.description: A police officer's fatal shooting of a man in Madison, Wisconsin, quickly spurred protests and calls for accountability.

item.title: The FDA has identified a new outbreak of cyclosporiasis that…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The FDA has identified a new outbreak of cyclosporiasis that has sickened at least 72 people, according the agency. The additional outbreak comes in the midst of the U.S.’s worst year on record for the intestinal illness.
item.content:encoded: The FDA has identified a new outbreak of cyclosporiasis that has sickened at least 72 people, according the agency. The additional outbreak comes in the midst of the U.S.’s worst year on record for the intestinal illness.

item.title: Iran flew Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps commanders, mili…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Iran flew Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps commanders, military advisers and missile and drone-related equipment into Yemen this month, according to four sources, in a move that suggests Tehran is seeking to strengthen the ability of its Houthi allies to threaten Red Sea shipping reut.rs/4bbvzkR
item.content:encoded: Iran flew Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps commanders, military advisers and missile and drone-related equipment into Yemen this month, according to four sources, in a move that suggests Tehran is seeking to strengthen the ability of its Houthi allies to threaten Red Sea shipping reut.rs/4bbvzkR

item.title: A man was shot and killed by police in Madison, Wisconsin, o…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A man was shot and killed by police in Madison, Wisconsin, on Wednesday afternoon during a physical struggle with several officers, authorities said.
item.content:encoded: A man was shot and killed by police in Madison, Wisconsin, on Wednesday afternoon during a physical struggle with several officers, authorities said.

item.title: A specialist UK tribunal awards BBC correspondent Vincent Ke…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A specialist UK tribunal awards BBC correspondent Vincent Kearney £20K in damages after MI5 and police admitted to illegally obtaining Kearney's call records (Dominic Ponsford/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A specialist UK tribunal awards BBC correspondent Vincent Kearney £20K in damages after MI5 and police admitted to illegally obtaining Kearney's call records (Dominic Ponsford/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: Marine biologists in Mexico captured video of the brutal way…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Marine biologists in Mexico captured video of the brutal way that killer whales hunt sunfish. With an unusual maneuver, the orcas pulverize the giants. nyti.ms/4whZsZ8
item.content:encoded: Marine biologists in Mexico captured video of the brutal way that killer whales hunt sunfish. With an unusual maneuver, the orcas pulverize the giants. nyti.ms/4whZsZ8

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: While many have called the …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: While many have called the 2026 World Cup the best of all time, it's impossible to judge without first working out where the previous 22 stand.

We ranked all 23 World Cups played over the past 96 years. nyti.ms/4ysPupo
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: While many have called the 2026 World Cup the best of all time, it's impossible to judge without first working out where the previous 22 stand.

We ranked all 23 World Cups played over the past 96 years. nyti.ms/4ysPupo

item.title: Three longtime Philadelphia police officers spent years work…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description:
Three longtime Philadelphia police officers spent years working in the department’s narcotics unit. They all died of glioblastoma, an aggressive form of brain cancer, within years of each other.

And they may not be the only ones.
item.content:encoded:
Three longtime Philadelphia police officers spent years working in the department’s narcotics unit. They all died of glioblastoma, an aggressive form of brain cancer, within years of each other.

And they may not be the only ones.
